parameters.text:
=Classify the intent of the following outreach email and describe it visually using the summary card format:

Email Content:
{{ $json.Personalized_Message }}

Analyze the message’s intent, tone, and purpose.
Identify whether it’s sales, networking, or other, and fill out the “summary_card” fields accordingly.

options.systemMessage:
You are an expert marketing AI trained to analyze and classify B2B outreach emails.
Your job is to determine whether each email message is intended for sales outreach, networking, or other purposes.
Analyze both the tone and the content.

“Sales” means the sender is promoting, selling, or offering a product, service, or meeting.

“Networking” means the sender wants to connect, collaborate, or share insights.

“Other” means the message doesn’t clearly fit either category.

Always respond using the following visual UI-style JSON card format:

{
  "email_type": "sales | networking | other",
  "confidence": "High | Medium | Low",
  "summary_card": {
    "🧑‍💼 Sender Intent": "<short explanation>",
    "🎯 Goal": "<what the email is trying to achieve>",
    "💬 Key Phrases": ["list of important detected words"],
    "📩 Visualization": "simple short visual summary like: [SALES EMAIL] FintechX CEO → Offer demo of AI product"
  }
}

parameters.text:
=Use the details below to compose a visually styled outreach email following the structured HTML format above.

Recipient Information:
{{ $('Append to Google Sheets').item.json.Personalized_Message }}
Name: Josh Ochocki

Role: Senior Consultant

Company: Stratacom, Inc

Industry: Information Technology and Services

Email Purpose: Sales Outreach
Objective: Introduce our growth acceleration service and start a conversation about collaboration.
Sender Name: Alex Carter

Message: {{ $('Append to Google Sheets').item.json.Personalized_Message }}

Format this into a clean, styled HTML message that feels personal and professional — not promotional.

options.systemMessage:
You are an expert B2B email copywriter and HTML designer who creates structured, visually appealing outreach emails. Your goal is to craft professional messages that look elegant and human-written, not robotic. Rules: Write the email in clean, semantic HTML (not Markdown). Use light UI elements such as: Subtle color for highlights (e.g., #2E86C1 for names, #1C2833 for headings). Section headers, separators, and soft shadows. Clear hierarchy (intro → context → value → CTA). Keep the tone friendly, personalized, and concise (under 120 words). Always include the sender’s sign-off at the end. Never use over-promotional language or spammy formatting. Output format: Return valid HTML that renders like a professional mini-email card:

Hi {first_name},

{personalized_message}

Best,
{sender_name}

This output should be ready to send as HTML content in an email node.

json.job_summary: Armor Concepts is a leading manufacturer and distributor of entry point security and repair solutions. Unlike alarm systems, which alert you after someone has already entered, our products help stop intruders from entering in the first place. Our solutions are also cost effective tools for repairing existing damage from previous break-ins. Through our proprietary Door Jamb Armor, EZ-Armor, FIX-A-JAMB and Armor Latch lines, we provide solutions for just about any door and budget. We distribute our products through Lowe's, Menards, ACE, Do-It-Best, Grainger and numerous regional distributors. Armor Concepts is simply the best at helping to keep intruders out! json.summary:
Take your job seriously, not yourself.

I have a proven track record of success, attaining 209% annual quota attainment as a BDR at McAfee as well as coaching two MVP winners. The key to my success is maintaining my uniqueness in a world of sales-robots, using data to make the most of my activities, and maintaining a rigorous work ethic.

I believe the ultimate goal of a seller is to gain an understanding of a client's situation, including both challenges and successes. Then, using this understanding, we are tasked with helping our client's formulate solutions to overcome those challenges and fully utilize their successes.

I received my Bachelors degree in Political Science and English from Austin College and have experience in on-prem, cloud, and hybrid infrastructure (with certifications) and IT Security.

Feel free to contact me if you would like to connect.

json.summary:
I'm an IT manager with a specialty for team building that wants to change the way people think about what IT is capable of.

IT isn't an expense report, a block of money that gets spent every quarter to keep the lights on. IT is a driving force for innovation and profit. IT is about finding barriers to productivity that are holding people back and knocking them down. Its about making everyone around us better at what they do and always being there when people need help. That's at the core of who I am and its what all good IT staff should be. If done correctly IT should be the heart of any company; anyone should be able to walk up with any problem and know that IT will find a solution for them. Through that guiding principle I drive my teams to push their companies to new heights

In my spare time I'm expanding my knowledge of computer science, industrial and organizational psychology, weightlifting, and gaming (ask me about D&D)

json.job_summary: We are a medical device company located in Research Triangle Park, NC with a ground-breaking approach for local anesthetic delivery and buffering.At Anutra, we believe that a patient experience and a practitioner's efficiency are closely linked. We have set out to revolutionize the delivery of local anesthetics by utilizing science and innovation to bring to the market a ground-breaking product. We intend to enhance a patient's visit by reducing pain and shortening procedure time. Meanwhile, we believe that we can help increase efficiency, predictability and profitability for dentists around the world.

json.job_summary: Profit Velocity offers state-of-the-art financial analysis tools that help private equity investors and their manufacturing portfolio companies identify previously undetectable value creation opportunities with time-based analytics. Financial consultants leverage the company’s proprietary data visualization and analytics capabilities to serve private equity firms assessing acquisition opportunities. Profit Velocity’s unique ‘what if’ planning capabilities enable manufacturers to model precise adjustments to sales, production and pricing strategies that enhance financial performance.
json.summary: Author, inventor and visionary entrepreneur with expertise in data analytics, financial analysis and manufacturing. Developer of a groundbreaking analytical tool designed to quantify and visualize previously unseen opportunities for growing the revenue and earnings of complex manufacturers by leveraging time-based metrics. Expert in operational finance and private equity. Boston Consulting Group alumnus. JD/MBA from Harvard Law School and Harvard Business School.

experience.summary: Maxager pioneered the early development of time-based analytics by integrating Goldratt’s constraints management principles with organizational learning concepts (drawn from Michael’s book Bionomics). The company developed its profit information platform in collaboration with over 100 manufacturers across North America, Europe, Japan, Taiwan and Southeast Asia in industries including steel making, semiconductor fabrication, consumer packaging, specialty chemicals and building products.

Bionomics: Economy as Ecosystem Wall Street Journal: "Revolutionary…signals a fundamental shift in the way people should think about economics." Amazon.com: "Hailed as a landmark account of how we organize ourselves for work, this wise, experience-tested book looks to nature as the model for how things work in the modern business world. Rothschild's anecdote-rich text challenges traditional thinking with a fresh vision of economics as a self-organizing system that is as natural as life itself."
Advised leading manufacturers on matters of competitive strategy and financial performance.

Profit Velocity offers state-of-the-art financial analysis tools that help private equity investors and their manufacturing portfolio companies identify previously undetectable value creation opportunities with time-based analytics. Financial consultants leverage the company’s proprietary data visualization and analytics capabilities to serve private equity firms assessing acquisition opportunities. Profit Velocity’s unique ‘what if’ planning capabilities enable manufacturers to model precise adjustments to sales, production and pricing strategies that enhance financial performance.

Neuroscientist turned market researcher who is passionate about well-designed research, brand strategy, data analysis, and creative problem solving. Looking for opportunities in research, marketing, strategy, operations and project/account management.

json.job_title: director of it and information security
json.Description: Well-rounded IT professional with 9 years’ experience, specializing in quality, network and systems administration, infrastructure, and information security management. A proven ability to develop and implement information risk strategies that support business and IT objectives. Consulting information security/technology experience across a range of companies. Respected as an energetic and motivational team leader; able to drive forward progress and on-time delivery of large-scaled, multi-system projects in fast-paced, deadline-driven environments. Skilled in compliance, mitigation, remediation, threat and vulnerability management, IT security policy/procedure/metrics, and overall Information Security program development and maturation.

I am a Software Engineer specializing in machine learning and artificial intelligence. My focus is on the optimization of software engineering solutions using techniques from ML/AI. I have also gained some experience in image recognition using OpenCV. I have recently started doing some research and projects to learn more about web development to broaden my skills. Full Stack Web Developer and former IT Business Development Manager with experience in ReactJS, Javascript, JQuery, HTML5, CSS3, Node.js, Express, MySQL, Sequelize, AJAX, Bootstrap 3/4, MongoDB, Data Visualization. Has managed many IT projects with a high level focus on requirements gathering, planning and client satisfaction.

json.job_title: vice president of technology and services
json.Description: Currently working as Vice President of Technology and Services. Coaching, mentoring and supporting 40 technical team members that support and maintain network and computer systems for multiple verticals specializing in medical, legal, hospitality and k-12 education. Helping with budget, security, compliance (SOX, HIPAA, FERPA, PCI) and process controls. Extensive experience in new construction network design and project management. Oversee and approve future expansion in a hosted cloud infrastructure for small to medium businesses across multiple secure datacenters.
CEO at Performance Predictions | FSTA BOD | Founder of Insightpool

Take your job seriously, not yourself.

I have a proven track record of success, attaining 209% annual quota attainment as a BDR at McAfee as well as coaching two MVP winners. The key to my success is maintaining my uniqueness in a world of sales-robots, using data to make the most of my activities, and maintaining a rigorous work ethic.

I believe the ultimate goal of a seller is to gain an understanding of a client's situation, including both challenges and successes. Then, using this understanding, we are tasked with helping our client's formulate solutions to overcome those challenges and fully utilize their successes.

I received my Bachelors degree in Political Science and English from Austin College and have experience in on-prem, cloud, and hybrid infrastructure (with certifications) and IT Security.

Feel free to contact me if you would like to connect.

main.node: Run an Actor and get dataset
